feed.title: Lodz Papers in Pragmatics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Lodz Papers in Pragmatics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Force-dynamics and the pragmatics of counter proximisation in Iranian media discourse
entry.summary: Authors: Ali Basarati DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0104 Pages: Page range: 1-25

entry.title: Resistance effect in Ukrainian president Zelenskyy’s international war discourse: cognitive-constructionist perspective
entry.summary: Authors: Serhiy Potapenko, Nataliia Talavira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0033 Pages: Page range: 27-49

entry.title: Corpus analysis of investigating the pragmatic aspects of speech acts within the public discourse on immigration in the United States
entry.summary: Authors: Abbas Hussein Tarish DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0016 Pages: Page range: 51-82

entry.title: Metaphor: Bill Clinton’s rhetorical weapon to foster peace between Jordan and Israel
entry.summary: Authors: Sadam Issa DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0011 Pages: Page range: 83-114

entry.title: Improving Hebrew offensive language classification using LLM-assisted human-in-the-loop annotation!!
entry.summary: Authors: Chaya Liebeskind, Yael Yefet DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0093 Pages: Page range: 115-140

entry.title: Impoliteness in online airline complaints: a Kuwaiti perspective on flight delays and cancellations
entry.summary: Authors: Bader S. Alshammari, Abdel Rahman Mitib Altakhaineh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0043 Pages: Page range: 141-163

entry.title: Discursive practices in the manosphere: an analysis of the language of victimhood and blame in Men’s Rights Activism (MRA)
entry.summary: Authors: Olusegun Oladele Jegede DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0066 Pages: Page range: 165-186

entry.title: Refusals in Moroccan Arabic and American English

entry.title: Extralinguistic factors of language personality formation

entry.title: Lexical metadiscursive stance markers in research article abstracts: a study of management subfields
entry.summary: Authors: Esmaeel Ali Salimi, Ali Marami Hajikandi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0045 Pages: Page range: 233-253

entry.title: Linguistic manipulation in telephone scam conversations: how are discourse strategies used to control victims?
entry.summary: Authors: Qiule Li, Mei Yuit Chan, Boon Sim Ng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2025-0018 Pages: Page range: 255-290
